scripts.test: npm run test:neon-heist:logic && npm run test:orbit-rescue:logic && npm run test:tide-courier:logic && npm run test:cavern-blast:logic && npm run test:magnet-forge:logic && npm run test:ember-shift:logic && npm run test:rail-rift:logic && npm run test:glyph-keeper:logic && npm run test:pixel-orchard:logic && npm run test:signal-sprint:logic && npm run test:vault-pusher:logic && npm run test:comet-lantern:logic && npm run test:frostbite-freight:logic
scripts.test:neon-heist:logic: node -e "const mod=require('./src/js/neon-heist.js'); const result=mod.runSelfCheck(40); if (!result.ok) { console.error(JSON.stringify(result)); process.exit(1); } console.log(JSON.stringify(result));"
